    A

    addMember(UUID, UUID, TeamRole) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Adds the given player to the given team with the specified role.
    ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    A team administrator.
    API_VERSION - Static variable in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsAPI
    The current Teams API version string.

    C

    canManage(TeamRole) - Method in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    Returns true if this role is permitted to manage (promote, demote, kick) a member of the given role.
    com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api - package com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api
     
    com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event - package com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
     
    com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model - package com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model
     
    createTeam(String, UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Creates a new team with the given name owned by the given player.

    D

    deleteTeam(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Deletes the team with the given ID and removes all its members.

    G

    getAllTeams() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns all registered teams.
    getCreatorUUID() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamCreateEvent
    Returns the UUID of the player who requested the team creation.
    getDisplayName() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the display name of this team, as shown to players.
    getFormerRole() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    Returns the role the player held before leaving the team.
    getHandlerList() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamCreateEvent
    Returns the shared HandlerList for this event type.
    getHandlerList() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamDeleteEvent
    Returns the shared HandlerList for this event type.
    getHandlerList() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    Returns the shared HandlerList for this event type.
    getHandlerList() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    Returns the shared HandlerList for this event type.
    getHandlerList() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    Returns the shared HandlerList for this event type.
    getHandlers() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamCreateEvent
    getHandlers() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamDeleteEvent
    getHandlers() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    getHandlers() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    getHandlers() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    getId() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the unique identifier of this team.
    getJoinedAt() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamMember
    Returns the instant at which this player joined the team.
    getMaxSize() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the maximum allowed number of members in this team.
    getMember(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the TeamMember record for the given player, if they are a member.
    getMemberInfo(UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns the TeamMember record for the given player within the given team.
    getMemberRole(UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns the role of the given player within the given team.
    getMembers() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns all members of this team, including the owner.
    getMemberUUIDs() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the UUIDs of all players who are members of this team, including the owner.
    getName() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the internal name of this team.
    getNewRole() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    Returns the role the player will be assigned after this change.
    getOldRole() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    Returns the role the player held before this change.
    getOwnerUUID() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the UUID of the player who owns this team.
    getPlayerTeam(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Retrieves the team that the given player currently belongs to.
    getPlayerUUID() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    Returns the UUID of the player who is joining the team.
    getPlayerUUID() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    Returns the UUID of the player who is leaving the team.
    getPlayerUUID() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    Returns the UUID of the player whose role is changing.
    getPlayerUUID() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamMember
    Returns the UUID of the player this membership belongs to.
    getPriority() - Method in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    Returns the numeric priority of this role.
    getRole() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    Returns the role that will be assigned to the player upon joining.
    getRole() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamMember
    Returns the role this member currently holds within the team.
    getService() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsAPI
    Returns the currently registered TeamsService provider, or null if no provider has been registered.
    getSize() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns the current number of members in this team.
    getTeam() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamEvent
    Returns the team involved in this event.
    getTeam(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Retrieves a team by its unique ID.
    getTeamByName(String) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Retrieves a team by its name.
    getTeamCount() - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns the total number of teams currently registered with this provider.

    H

    hasTeam(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns true if the given player belongs to any team.

    I

    isAvailable() - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsAPI
    Returns true if at least one TeamsService provider is currently registered.
    isCancelled() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamCreateEvent
    isCancelled() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamDeleteEvent
    isCancelled() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    isCancelled() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    isCancelled() - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    isMember(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns true if the given player is a member of this team (any role).
    isMember(UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns true if the given player is a member (any role) of the given team.
    isOwner(UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.Team
    Returns true if the given player is the owner of this team.

    M

    MEMBER - Enum constant in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    A regular team member with no elevated permissions within the team.

    O

    outranks(TeamRole) - Method in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    Returns true if this role has a higher priority than other.
    OWNER - Enum constant in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    The owner of the team.

    R

    registerProvider(Plugin, TeamsService) - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsAPI
    Registers a TeamsService provider with Bukkit's ServicesManager at ServicePriority.Normal.
    registerProvider(Plugin, TeamsService, ServicePriority) - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsAPI
    Registers a TeamsService provider with Bukkit's ServicesManager at the specified priority.
    removeMember(UUID, UUID) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Removes the given player from the given team.

    S

    setCancelled(boolean) - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamCreateEvent
    setCancelled(boolean) - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamDeleteEvent
    setCancelled(boolean) - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    setCancelled(boolean) - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    setCancelled(boolean) - Method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    setMemberRole(UUID, UUID, TeamRole) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Changes the role of an existing team member.

    T

    Team - Interface in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model
    Represents a team managed by the active TeamsService.
    TeamCreateEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Fired when a new team is about to be created.
    TeamCreateEvent(Team, UUID) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamCreateEvent
    Creates a new TeamCreateEvent.
    TeamDeleteEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Fired when a team is about to be deleted.
    TeamDeleteEvent(Team) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamDeleteEvent
    Creates a new TeamDeleteEvent.
    TeamEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Abstract base class for all Teams API events.
    TeamEvent(Team) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamEvent
    Creates a new synchronous TeamEvent.
    TeamEvent(Team, boolean) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamEvent
    Creates a new TeamEvent that may be asynchronous.
    teamExists(String) - Method in interface com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsService
    Returns true if a team with the given name currently exists.
    TeamJoinEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Fired when a player is about to join a team.
    TeamJoinEvent(Team, UUID, TeamRole) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamJoinEvent
    Creates a new TeamJoinEvent.
    TeamLeaveEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Fired when a player is about to leave (or be removed from) a team.
    TeamLeaveEvent(Team, UUID, TeamRole) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamLeaveEvent
    Creates a new TeamLeaveEvent.
    TeamMember - Interface in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model
    Represents a single member within a Team.
    TeamRole - Enum Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model
    Represents the role of a member within a Team.
    TeamRoleChangeEvent - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event
    Fired when a team member's role is about to change.
    TeamRoleChangeEvent(Team, UUID, TeamRole, TeamRole) - Constructor for class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.event.TeamRoleChangeEvent
    Creates a new TeamRoleChangeEvent.
    TeamsAPI - Class in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api
    Static facade and entry point for the Teams API.
    TeamsService - Interface in com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api
    The central service interface for the Teams API.

    U

    unregisterProvider(TeamsService) - Static method in class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.api.TeamsAPI
    Unregisters a TeamsService provider from Bukkit's ServicesManager.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
